_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Trust Center branch of the excel-activities/execute-macro-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (same 'Cannot run macro' COMException as branch 1) → jobs logs (VBA enumeration includes the configured macro 'Module1.ProcessData' — branch 1 RULED OUT) → workflow source. Combined with the user's 'works on dev machine' clue, the diagnosis is branch 5 (Trust Center on Robot host blocks macros). Agent must recommend host-side Trust Center inspection / Trusted Locations fix.
